Expiration Date Extension 
The FDA coordinates and regulates expiration date extension when needed during public health emergencies and other crises.
Examples of MCMs include drugs, vaccines, and devices, such as diagnostic tests and personal protective equipment. 
Medical Countermeasures (MCMs) 
FDA coordinates medical countermeasure (MCM) development, preparedness, and response.
